# Setback

> Setback tells a contractor or homeowner every permit their construction project needs, in under 60 seconds — agencies, jurisdiction-specific rejection risks, a realistic timeline, and a draft permit narrative. Any trade, any US location, no account required.

Setback is not legal advice and does not replace an official agency determination. See /disclaimer.html.

## Product
- [Get a roadmap](index.html): the main tool — describe a project and location, get a permit roadmap
- Pricing: $49 for the roadmap, $97 for the full workspace, one time — shown in full on [Get a roadmap](index.html)
- [Setback Pro](index.html): $79/mo membership, drops every full workspace to $49
- [For permit expediters](expediters.html): prepaid packs for expediting firms, $549/15 roadmaps or $1,499/50 roadmaps
- [How it works](how-it-works.html): what the roadmap is based on, and what to independently confirm

## Policies
- [Terms of Service](terms.html)
- [Privacy Policy](privacy.html)
